channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson has had problems against the Steelers. Now he'll finally have a big home crowd to help
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — Lamar Jackson's struggles against Pittsburgh have been well documented. Now he'll finally have help he's never enjoyed before in this rivalry — from a packed stadium that's actually cheering for him.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Stadium site provision included in federal spending bill, a win for the Commanders and NFL
item.description: The Washington Commanders are another step closer to the possibility of returning to the franchise’s old home in the nation’s capital.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The ATP men's tennis tour paid $1.3 million to 26 players via a guaranteed-income plan in 2024
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The ATP men's tennis tour paid out $1.3 million to a total of 26 players in 2024 under a new financial program called Baseline that guarantees minimum annual incomes for players ranked in the top 250.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL has a record number of playoff clinches and bottom dwellers with 3 weeks to go
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ There might by more intrigue in the race for the No. 1 pick than in the race to make the playoffs in the final three weeks.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 3 Notre Dame, No. 9 Indiana take one last spin with 1-year QBs Kurtis Rourke and Riley Leonard
item.description: Indiana coach Curt Cignetti pored through the transfer portal last December, looking for a proven quarterback with a winning resume who could quickly become the cornerstone in another rebuilding project. He landed on 23-year-old Kurtis Rourke, the 2022 Mid-American Conference MVP.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies lose first game of the season to UCSD, 75-73
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Off to its best start in school history, the Utah State basketball team dropped its first game of the year after ten straight victories, losing at home to UC San Diego Tuesday night, 75-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Falcons name rookie Michael Penix Jr. as starting QB, benching veteran Kirk Cousins
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: The Chicago Bears have no fire in the trenches
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — When it comes to what's wrong with the Chicago Bears, some argue it's coaching. Others dare to say it's Caleb Williams. Most toss it up to organizational dysfunction, or some supernatural hex inadvertently brought about by the McCaskeys being the McCaskeys.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New York Yankees acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from Cubs for pitcher Cody Poteet
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Outfielder Cody Bellinger was acquired by the New York Yankees from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet. Chicago will send the Yankees $5 million as part of the trade.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coaches question timing of transfer portal window as they prepare for College Football Playoff
item.description: SMU coach Rhett Lashlee took a moment while preparing his team for the College Football Playoff to address the ever-growing concern over the open transfer portal window. His problem isn't with players wanting to transfer.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS and PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vucevic scores 24 points as Bulls hold off Raptors 122-121 for 4th win in 6 games
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 24 points, Coby White added 19 and the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Toronto Raptors 122-121 on Monday night for their fourth win in six games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Isaac Wilson decides to return to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Upon second thought, Isaac Wilson is returning to Utah. Eight days after announcing he was entering the transfer portal, Wilson announced that he is returning to Utah, where will compete for the starting quarterback job with New Mexico transfer Devon Dampier.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before limping off with an ankle injury in the fourth quarter, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and Kansas City finally had a relatively easy win, 21-7 over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Grant DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head
item.description: Grant DuBose, who returned Sunday after a shoulder injury sidelined him for part of the season, was listed as being in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 3 Utah cowboys earn world champion titles at 2024 National Finals Rodeo
item.description: Three cowboys from Utah won world champion titles at the 2024 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo in Las Vegas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Shiffrin recovering after abdominal surgery to clean out deep puncture wound suffered in race crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin is recovering after undergoing abdominal surgery on Thursday night to clean out a puncture wound she received in a giant slalom crash two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies set school record with 10-0 start
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State has been playing basketball since 1903. Only four times have the Aggies started a season with nine straight wins. On Saturday, this Utah State team became the first to win ten in a row to start a season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz come up short in shootout with Phoenix, 134-126
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In an incredible display of shooting by both teams, the Utah Jazz could not keep up with the Phoenix Suns in a 134-126 loss Friday night at the Delta Center. Both teams made 22 three-pointers and shot well over 50 percent from the field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Game-worn Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jersey sells for $333K at auction
item.description: A game-worn Wilt Chamberlain jersey from the 1970-71 Los Angeles Lakers playoff run sold for $333,601 at Grey Flannel Auctions’ holiday auction this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Poway 16-year-old starts nonprofit to deliver basketballs for the holidays
item.description: William Ralston's bedroom might look like an ordinary teenage boy's roo, but it is his very own Santa Claus-style workshop.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Duke lacrosse players' rape accuser admits she lied
item.description: The former exotic dancer confessed to lying about the encounter in 2006 during her appearance on the “Let’s Talk with Kat” podcast.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC completes 2024 MLS Expansion Draft. Here is who they selected
item.description: San Diego FC's roster is starting to come together after taking part in the 2024 MLS Expansion Draft.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Soccer icon Alex Morgan makes waves for Rady Children’s Giveathon: how to help
item.description: This holiday season, former San Diego Wave FC star Alex Morgan is spreading some cheer by way of her foundation and support of the annual iHeart Rady Children’s Giveathon.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: The fate of Tropicana Field's repairs lies in the hands of St. Pete City Council
item.description: The St. Pete City Council will vote on Thursday afternoon to begin the process of repairing Tropicana Field or not.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Oregon Ducks 'screwed' by CFP committee, Fox Sports analyst says
item.description: Joel Klatt, Fox Sports top college football analyst, blasted the CFP committee, claiming they did a "horrendous" job with their selections.
item.dc:creator: Matt Rawlings, NewsNation
